projects.name: Learning Management System
projects.description: A complete digital learning platform with role-based authentication, course management, video lectures, assignments, quizzes, and progress tracking for students, teachers, and administrators.

projects.name: AI Battle Arena
projects.description: An AI comparison platform that allows users to evaluate responses from multiple language models side by side, helping them discover the most accurate and useful answers.

projects.name: Moodify
projects.description: An AI-powered recommendation platform that suggests personalized content based on the user's mood, combining intuitive design with intelligent recommendations.

projects.name: Snitch
projects.description: A modern full-stack application focused on clean architecture, secure authentication, and an exceptional user experience.

projects.name: Doctor Appointment Management System
projects.description: A healthcare platform designed to simplify appointment scheduling, patient management, and communication between doctors and patients.

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A scalable online shopping application featuring authentication, product management, shopping cart functionality, secure payments, and order management.

education.degree: Master of Science in Information Technology
education.description: My postgraduate education deepened my understanding of software engineering, distributed systems, databases, algorithms, and modern web technologies. It also encouraged me to apply theoretical knowledge through practical projects and continuous self-learning.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology
education.description: My undergraduate studies provided a strong foundation in programming, computer science, and software development, inspiring me to pursue a career in full-stack engineering.

experience.description: Designed and deployed custom automated agents utilizing client-side RAG pipelines with the modern @google/genai Node SDK. Optimized context mapping algorithms that reduced token usage on extensive chat loads. Constructed microservices executing asynchronous web socket channels and state-driven conversation components.

Coordinated development of key dynamic features on several enterprise-grade SaaS models. Engineered complex data schema validation filters, password encryption middleware, and dynamic multi-user session management workflows. Boosted layout rendering speeds by transitioning heavy sections to pure CSS utility classes and modularized state systems.

messages.name: Sarah Jenkins
messages.subject: Collaboration Opportunity - AI Chat Widget Integration
messages.message: Hi there! I came across your portfolio and I am extremely impressed by your Generative AI integrations, especially the Chatbot Platform. We have a client looking to build a tailored RAG chatbot on their website and we'd love to contract you for this project. Let me know when you are open for a brief introductory call!
